mapper.sql: conversation.id, conversation.title, conversation.project_id, (SELECT recent.message FROM chat_message recent WHERE recent.conversation_id = conversation.id ORDER BY recent.created_at DESC, recent.id DESC LIMIT 1) AS last_message, (SELECT COUNT(*)::integer FROM chat_message counted WHERE counted.conversation_id = conversation.id) AS message_count, conversation.created_at, conversation.updated_at
mapper.select: SELECT FROM chat_conversation conversation ORDER BY conversation.updated_at DESC, conversation.id DESC

SELECT project.id, project.name, (SELECT COUNT(*)::integer FROM chat_conversation conversation WHERE conversation.project_id = project.id) AS conversation_count, project.created_at, project.updated_at FROM chat_project project WHERE project.id = #{id}

SELECT project.id, project.name, (SELECT COUNT(*)::integer FROM chat_conversation conversation WHERE conversation.project_id = project.id) AS conversation_count, project.created_at, project.updated_at FROM chat_project project ORDER BY project.name ASC, project.id ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO chat_message ( conversation_id, role, message, attachment_name, attachment_content, created_at ) VALUES (#{conversationId}, #{role}, #{message}, #{attachmentName}, #{attachmentContent}, COALESCE(#{createdAt}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP))
mapper.select: SELECT id, conversation_id, role, message, attachment_name, created_at FROM chat_message WHERE conversation_id = #{conversationId} ORDER BY created_at ASC, id ASC

SELECT id, conversation_id, role, message, attachment_name, created_at FROM (SELECT id, conversation_id, role, message, attachment_name, created_at FROM chat_message WHERE conversation_id = #{conversationId} ORDER BY created_at DESC, id DESC LIMIT #{limit}) recent_messages ORDER BY created_at ASC, id ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE chat_conversation SET updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
